primary_sources.name: KDIGO 2024 Clinical Practice Guideline for the Evaluation and Management of Chronic Kidney Disease
primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive definitions of GFR, ACR, and staging criteria for CKD assessment

primary_sources.name: KDOQI Clinical Practice Guideline for Hemodialysis Adequacy: 2015 Update
primary_sources.relevance: Authoritative definitions and targets for Kt/V and URR in dialysis adequacy

primary_sources.name: Laboratory Assessment of Kidney Disease: Glomerular Filtration Rate, Urinalysis, and Proteinuria
primary_sources.relevance: Detailed technical specifications for GFR estimation equations and ACR measurement

primary_sources.name: CMS Conditions for Coverage for End-Stage Renal Disease Facilities
primary_sources.relevance: Regulatory definitions and minimum standards for dialysis adequacy measurements

secondary_sources.name: American Journal of Kidney Diseases - Laboratory Values in CKD
secondary_sources.relevance: Clinical interpretation of BUN and serum creatinine in various patient populations
